title: candollea uniflora
intro: Candollea uniflora, also known as the single-flowered candollea, is a plant species belonging to the family Icacinaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Candollea uniflora include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Candollea uniflora can be made through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
